description: Import order for Abuvi.Setup CSV importer. Files must be imported in this sequence to satisfy foreign key dependencies.

importOrder.notes: No dependencies. Creates User entities. Duplicates detected by email (case-insensitive).
Requires Users to exist (resolves representativeEmail -> User). Also back-patches User.FamilyUnitId.
Requires FamilyUnits to exist (resolves familyUnitName -> FamilyUnit).
No dependencies. Independent of Users/FamilyUnits track. Could run in parallel with steps 1-3.
Requires Camps to exist (resolves campName -> Camp).

parallelGroups.notes: family-units.csv depends on group A. camps.csv is independent.
family-members.csv depends on family-units.csv. camp-editions.csv depends on camps.csv.
